titleStmt.title: SII 25.220: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 220. (A.R. No. 220 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

The record furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 11, Vaikāśi 27 which are insufficient for verification. Moreover, the name of the reigning king is not given in the record to clinch the correct date. But palaeographically this epigraph may be assigned to c. 14th century.

It records an arrangement (vyavasthai) made by Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvakaṉmigaḷ of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār to provide for the food-offerings, on three sandhis a day, lamps and worship on the days of occasions like vishu, ayaṉa-saṁkramaṇa, kārttigai festivals, etc., to the deity Aḻagiya-Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār set up in the circumambulatory path (tirunaḍaimāḷigai) in the above temple by Īśāṉaśivāchāriyar who belonged to the lineage (santāṉa) of the mudaliyārs of Tiruchchattimuṟṟam. It is stated that the endowment was maintained from out of 300 varāgaṉ-paṇam deposited into the temple treasury. The interest (poliśai) accrued from this amount annually is 108 paṇam. The paddy obtained for one paṇam was one kalam. Six nāḻi of rice was utilized for the food-offerings made to the deity.
This document was attested by the temple accountant (kōyiṟ-kaṇakku) Uśāttāṉam-uḍaiyāṉ Tiruvuśāttāṉappiriyaṉ, dēvakaṉmi Poṉṉambala-baṭṭaṉ, māḍāpattiyam Tirumāligaip-piḷḷai and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeccurateva m vyavasthai paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār koyi
tirunaṭamāḷikaiyil tiruccattimuṟṟattu mutaliyirāRead as ‘mutaliyār’ • cantāṉattut tiru mutaliyārāṉa Īśāṉaśivācāriyar Eṟiyaruḷap paṇṇiṉa
Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku pūjaikku Uṭalāka Iva paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉavarākaṉ paṇam muṉṉūṟu I
ppaṇam muṉṉūṟṟukkum muppatu vaṭṭattu nūṟṟukku muṉṟāka vanta paṇa Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku policai paṇam nūṟṟeṭ
ṭu Ippaṇam nūṟṟeṭṭu vinelvilai paṇam Oṉṟukku nellukala ka nellu pa
ti ṉoṉṟāvatu vaikācimātam Irupatteḻāntiyati mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku muṉṟucanti Āṭiyaruḷavum Aṟunāḻi Arici Amutu ceytaruḷavum
Iraṇṭu tiruviḷakku Eriyavum viṣuv Ayaṉa saṅkramaṅkaḷum tiruppavitra tirukkāttikai viḷakkiṭu vuḷḷiṭṭa viśeṣadivaṣaṅkaḷ
pūjaikoṇṭaruḷavum Ippaṭikku palakaiyile Arici Aḷanta kuṟaiyākātapaṭi cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṇam Innāyaṉār
koyil mutaṟ prākāram sthalam Icaikka muṉṉūṟum Oṭukkivittu kaikkoṇṭom Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmika Ippaṭi ca
Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakku Ucāttāṉa muṭaiyāṉ tiruvucāttāṉappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tevakaṉmam poṉṉampala paṭṭaṉum campanta
p perumāḷ paṭṭaṉum Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṭā pattiyam tirumāḷikaippiḷḷaiyum pala viḷakkuppiḷḷaiyum Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai comaṉāta
tevar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poṉṉampalaṉampi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
